presets.description: Manage Baidu Netdisk cloud files, including browsing, searching, downloading, and sharing files.
presets.descriptionZh: 管理百度网盘中的云端文件，支持浏览、搜索、下载和分享文件。

presets.description: Develop, deploy, and manage CloudBase apps with databases, cloud functions, storage, hosting, and runtime operations.
presets.descriptionZh: 开发、部署和管理腾讯云开发应用，覆盖数据库、云函数、云存储、静态托管和运行诊断。

presets.description: Ask questions about any public GitHub repository
presets.descriptionZh: 查询任意公开 GitHub 仓库的结构与文档问答

presets.description: Deploy full-stack projects to EdgeOne Pages and generate preview links quickly.
presets.descriptionZh: 将全栈项目快速部署到 EdgeOne Pages，并生成可访问的预览链接。

presets.description: FBSir connector for identity, scene-pack lookup, first-value and continued-use recording, lebao status, and super-partner handoff.
presets.descriptionZh: 福帮手人机协同连接器：面向 WorkBuddy 的身份识别、场景包查询、首值与继续使用记录、乐包状态确认和超级合伙人交接。

presets.description: GitHub official MCP: repos, issues, pull requests
presets.descriptionZh: GitHub 官方 MCP：仓库、Issue、PR 操作

presets.description: Connect to GitHub remote MCP capabilities for repositories, issues, and pull requests.
presets.descriptionZh: 连接 GitHub 远程能力，管理仓库、Issue 和 Pull Request。

presets.description: Read, search, and manage Gmail messages through a local email MCP server.
presets.descriptionZh: 通过本地邮箱连接器读取、搜索和管理 Gmail 邮件。

presets.description: MCP server for Gongfeng API, supporting repository management, file operations, and more.
presets.descriptionZh: 工蜂 API 的 MCP 服务器，支持仓库管理、文件操作等功能。

presets.description: Search and use ima knowledge-base content through MCP.
presets.descriptionZh: 搜索和使用 ima 知识库内容，为问答和资料检索提供支持。

presets.description: iWiki MCP service empowers LLMs with document creation and retrieval capabilities. Supports creating iWiki documents and Markdown documents, searching related documents, and retrieving space/document metadata.
presets.descriptionZh: iWiki的MCP服务，为大模型赋予文档创建、检索等能力：支持创建 iWiki 文档、Markdown 文档，能够通过检索找出相关联的文档，也可以获取空间、文档的基本信息和元数据信息。

presets.description: Manage Jira issues, projects, and workflows through a local Atlassian MCP server.
presets.descriptionZh: 管理 Jira 项目、事项和工作流，支持查询、创建和更新任务。

presets.description: Create, search, read, edit, share, and organize WPS cloud documents and knowledge-base content.
presets.descriptionZh: 创建、搜索和管理金山文档（WPS 云文档），支持文档、表格、PDF、PPT 和知识库内容。

presets.description: KM official MCP - discover the best of Tencent knowledge.
presets.descriptionZh: KM官方MCP，发现腾讯精彩。

presets.description: Search, create, and manage Lexiang knowledge-base documents and files.
presets.descriptionZh: 搜索、创建和管理乐享知识库中的文档与文件，追踪团队知识更新。

presets.description: Query customers, advance opportunities, review leads, claim from the public pool, and log follow-ups in natural language—closing the sales workflow loop in a single sentence.
presets.descriptionZh: 用自然语言查客户、推商机、盘线索、领公海、写跟进，一句话打通销售工作闭环。

presets.description: Connect Notion workspaces for pages, databases, and knowledge management.
presets.descriptionZh: 连接 Notion 工作区，管理页面、数据库和知识内容。

presets.displayName: 北大法宝·法律智能检索
presets.description: Semantic (natural-language) + keyword (exact / fuzzy) dual-mode retrieval over Chinese laws, regulations and judicial cases. Every result links back to pkulaw.com — traceable, verifiable, ready to cite.
presets.descriptionZh: 语义（自然语言描述） + 关键词（精确/模糊查询）双模式检索法规与案例，结果均带 pkulaw.com 原文链接，可追溯、可复核、可直接引用。

presets.description: Query and verify corporate registration information. Supports shareholder structure, actual controllers, beneficial owners, executive teams, external investments, financial data, annual reports, and listing information — complete corporate identity verification and background checks through natural language.
presets.descriptionZh: 查询和核实企业工商登记信息。支持股东结构、实际控制人、受益所有人、高管团队、对外投资、财务数据、年报及上市信息查询，用自然语言快速完成企业身份核验与背景调查。

presets.description: Read, search, organize, and send QQ Mail messages and attachments.
presets.descriptionZh: 收发、搜索和整理 QQ 邮件，支持读取邮件内容、汇总邮件线索和管理附件。

presets.description: Connect Supabase projects for database and backend management through MCP.
presets.descriptionZh: 连接 Supabase 项目，管理数据库和后端资源。

presets.description: Manage stories, bugs, tasks, and iterations. Track progress, break down requirements, update statuses, and log timesheets across the full R&D lifecycle.
presets.descriptionZh: 管理需求、缺陷、任务和迭代。查询项目进度、拆分需求、流转状态、填写工时，覆盖需求到发布的研发全生命周期。

presets.description: TAPD MCP tool operates various resources in TAPD via MCP protocol, including stories, bugs, tasks, iterations, test cases, wiki, and comments.
presets.descriptionZh: TAPD MCP工具通过MCP协议操作TAPD中的各类资源，包括需求、缺陷、任务、迭代、测试用例、wiki和评论等。

presets.description: Query global stock data via Tongdaxin MCP. Supports screening, reports, and macro analysis.
presets.descriptionZh: 通过通达信 MCP 查询全球股票行情数据、条件选股、研究报告、公告资讯和宏观信息。支持个股基本面分析、同行业对比和智能选股筛查。

presets.description: Create, edit, and collaborate on Tencent Docs, spreadsheets, and slides.
presets.descriptionZh: 创建、编辑和协作腾讯文档，支持在线表格、文档和幻灯片的内容查询与整理。

presets.description: Tencent Qidian Customer Service connector. Use natural language to manage work orders (query / create / update / status change), monitor agent online status and real-time reception, retrieve customer profiles, pull chat records and messages from human / LLM / text-robot sessions, and view real-time service monitoring, session monitoring, satisfaction and response reports.
presets.descriptionZh: 腾讯企点客服连接器：用自然语言处理工单（查询/创建/更新/状态变更）、查询坐席在线与实时接待、检索/拉取客户资料、拉取人工/大模型/文本机器人的会话记录和消息、查看客服实时监控、会话监控、客服满意度与响应度报表等数据。

presets.description: Create, edit, and analyze Tencent Survey questionnaires, polls, exams, and responses.
presets.descriptionZh: 创建、管理和分析腾讯问卷，支持生成问卷、查看回收数据和设置题目逻辑。

presets.description: Manage Tencent Weiyun cloud files, including browsing, uploading, downloading, sharing, and organizing files.
presets.descriptionZh: 查看、上传、下载和整理微云文件，支持生成分享链接和管理云端目录。

presets.description: Query comprehensive enterprise data via Tianyancha MCP. Supports company registration info, shareholder structure, risk monitoring, intellectual property, executive teams, financial data, and more — complete business intelligence through natural language.
presets.descriptionZh: 通过天眼查 MCP 查询多维度企业数据。支持工商登记、股东结构、司法风险、知识产权、董监高、经营数据等 160+ 项企业数据能力，用自然语言完成企业尽调与商业情报分析。

presets.description: Manage WeCom customer operations with Weisheng SCRM, including customers, tags, groups, marketing assets, follow-ups, opportunities, reports, and schedules.
presets.descriptionZh: 管理企业微信客户运营数据，支持客户、标签、客户群、营销素材、跟进记录、商机、汇报和客户日程等能力。

presets.description: Huayu Yuandian Legal Data provides agents with MCP tool capabilities for laws and regulations, case documents, and enterprise information.
presets.descriptionZh: 华宇元典法律数据为智能体提供法律法规、案例文书、企业信息 MCP 工具能力。

presets.description: ZhiYan CI/CD official MCP, supporting TKE container deployment, pipeline execution records, artifact versions, release review orders, deployment history, and more.
presets.descriptionZh: 智研构建部署官方MCP，操作能力支持TKE容器部署，查询能力包括：流水线执行记录、制品版本、发布评审单、部署历史等。
